vocab.meaning: làm bừa bộn, chiếm diện tích không cần thiết
vocab.example: I prefer not to carry a mirror because I don't want to clutter up my small crossbody bag with extra items.

vocab.meaning: việc duy trì vẻ ngoài/thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: For individuals who prioritize constant aesthetic maintenance, carrying a portable mirror is non-negotiable.
With the advent of high-resolution smartphones, a physical mirror has become a redundant accessory in my daily life.

vocab.meaning: những hạn chế về không gian (trong túi xách)
vocab.example: Due to the spatial constraints of my wallet, I only carry the bare essentials, which excludes a hand mirror.

vocab.meaning: chỉnh sửa nhanh (lớp trang điểm hoặc đầu tóc)
vocab.example: I always have a small glass at hand for a quick touch-up before entering a professional meeting.
I’m terrified of my mirror shattering into pieces inside my bag, which is why I leave it at home.

vocab.meaning: sự tiện lợi trong việc chải chuốt/chỉnh đốn ngoại hình
vocab.example: I carry a tiny folding mirror purely for grooming convenience after a long flight or commute.

vocab.meaning: rất gọn nhẹ, dễ mang theo
vocab.example: The mirror I own is highly portable and fits seamlessly into the side pocket of my rucksack.

vocab.meaning: bỏ qua/không cần thiết phải làm gì
vocab.example: I often forgo the need to carry a mirror as I can easily find a reflective surface in most modern buildings.

vocab.meaning: kiểm tra một cách kín đáo
vocab.example: Having a small mirror allows me to discreetly check if there's any food stuck in my teeth after lunch.
